title: Front Office Manager - Swiggy Restaurant Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Swiggy Restaurant Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Swiggy Restaurant Partners are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
